Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Stephen Ward. Author, maintainer.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Ward, S. (2026). irtsim: Monte Carlo Simulation-Based Sample-Size Planning for Item Response Theory. R package version 0.1.2.9000. https://github.com/sward1/irtsim

@Manual{,
  title = {irtsim: Monte Carlo Simulation-Based Sample-Size Planning for Item Response Theory},
  author = {Stephen Ward},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.2.9000},
  url = {https://github.com/sward1/irtsim},
}

Schroeders, U., & Gnambs, T. (2025). Sample size planning in item response theory: A 10-decision framework. Advances in Methods and Practices in Psychological Science. doi:10.1177/25152459251314798

@Article{,
  title = {Sample size planning in item response theory: A 10-decision framework},
  author = {Ulrich Schroeders and Timo Gnambs},
  journal = {Advances in Methods and Practices in Psychological Science},
  year = {2025},
  doi = {10.1177/25152459251314798},
}
